settings.heroTitle: WhaleX — premium structure for serious traders.
settings.heroSubtitle: A black-and-gold TradingView indicator suite built around structure, OrderFlow zones, and risk-first execution planning.
settings.marketLine: Built for BTC, Gold, Forex, and index traders who want cleaner execution logic.

slides.title: Structure first. Signal second.
slides.text: Read the market with cleaner structure, zones, and risk visibility instead of chasing every candle.

slides.title: Zones, POC, retest, reclaim.
slides.text: Bring orderflow-style decision support into TradingView with a clean black-and-gold interface.

slides.title: Trade size before trade entry.
slides.text: Plan risk, stop distance, and lot sizing before execution — discipline starts before the signal.

products.name: WhaleX
products.description: WhaleX is the main structure indicator. It is designed to help traders understand market direction, clean structure shifts, and trade context without adding unnecessary chart noise.
features: Useful for BTC, Gold, Forex, and index traders

products.name: WhaleX OrderFlow
products.description: WhaleX OrderFlow focuses on zone-based decision support. It helps traders read top/bottom zones, POC context, volume-confirmed areas, retest behavior, and reclaim logic.
features: Built for structured intraday orderflow reading

products.name: WhaleX Risk Manager
products.description: WhaleX Risk Manager helps users plan trade risk before entering the market. It focuses on account balance, risk percentage, stop-loss distance, and position sizing discipline.
features: Start-date and end-date access tracking in tickets
Designed to reduce emotional position sizing

reviews.name: Early WhaleX User
reviews.text: The chart feels more structured. WhaleX helped me stop taking random entries.

reviews.name: Community Trader
reviews.text: Risk Manager is simple and useful before entering a trade. Good for discipline.
